tasks.label: Format with ruff
tasks.command: uv run ruff format . && uv run ruff check --fix .
tasks.detail: Runs ruff formatting and lint auto-fixes.

tasks.label: Format ruff & rumdl
tasks.command: uv run ruff format . && uv run ruff check --fix . && uv run rumdl format .
tasks.detail: Runs both ruff and rumdl to format the workspace.

tasks.label: Update Agent Skills
tasks.detail: Runs npx skills update with flags.
